
<style>
.msg { padding:10px; margin:10px 0; border-radius:8px; }
.msg.human { background: #2a2a2a; border: 1px solid #555; }
.msg.ai    { background: #262b36; border: 1px solid #445; }
.msg.tool  { background: #2e3330; border: 1px solid #474; }
summary { cursor:pointer; }
</style>
<details class="msg human">
<summary><strong>Human</strong></summary>

**Images**
<img alt="image" src="data:image/png;base64," />

**Content**
\[HUMAN\] Pick the blue circular object

</details>

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
\[REASONING\_NOTE\] From the current perception, I can see a blue circular object that appears to be Glass\_37 in the scene. To verify this before picking it up, I should first get a closer look to confirm its visual properties.

**Tool calls**
- **Tool call:** `Look`

```json
{
  "x": 0.91,
  "y": 0.62,
  "z": 0.93
}
```


<details>
<summary>📊 <strong>Instrumentations</strong></summary>

- **Generation timing (ms):** `{'start': 1762960665899, 'end': 1762960672917, 'elapsed': 7018}`

- **Tool timings (per call, ms):**
  - `Look` → `{'t0': 77051724, 't1': 77053043, 'elapsed': 1319}`
- **Token usage:** prompt=6422, completion=143, total=6565
</details>

</details>

<details class="msg tool">
<summary><strong>Tool Response: Look</strong></summary>

**Content**
Look complete. An augmented image will be returned in the next user message labeled \[VISUAL\_PERCEPTION\]. The \[symbolic perception\]\(\#symbolic\-perception\) has been updated

</details>

<details class="msg human">
<summary><strong>Human</strong></summary>

**Images**
<img alt="image" src="data:image/png;base64," />

**Content**
\[VISUAL\_PERCEPTION\]

</details>

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
\[REASONING\_NOTE\] After looking more closely, I can confirm that Glass\_37 is indeed the blue circular object in the scene. Now that I've verified its properties, I will proceed to pick it up.

**Tool calls**
- **Tool call:** `PickObject`

```json
{
  "ObjTag": "Glass_37"
}
```


<details>
<summary>📊 <strong>Instrumentations</strong></summary>

- **Generation timing (ms):** `{'start': 1762960674242, 'end': 1762960683919, 'elapsed': 9677}`
- **Tool timings (aggregate, ms):** `{'elapsed_sum': 2309.0}`
- **Tool timings (per call, ms):**
  - `PickObject` → `{'t0': 77062727, 't1': 77065036, 'elapsed': 2309}`
- **Token usage:** prompt=8007, completion=103, total=8110
</details>

</details>

<details class="msg tool">
<summary><strong>Tool Response: PickObject</strong></summary>

**Content**
Object Glass\_37 was not initially reachable; you moved to \(x=0.42, y=0.08, z=1.31\) and picked it successfully.

</details>

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
I have successfully picked up the blue circular glass object as requested. The system automatically moved me to a reachable position and I was able to grasp the object tagged as Glass\_37.

<details>
<summary>📊 <strong>Instrumentations</strong></summary>
